community.description: These instructions install IBM Boundary Community Edition. Looking for enterprise features like session recording, transparent sessions, credential injection, and multi-hop deployments? Refer to the Boundary Enterprise installation page.

enterprise.description: These instructions install IBM Boundary Enterprise. For community edition deployments without enterprise features, refer to the Boundary Community Edition install page.

sidecarMarketingCard.title: About Boundary
sidecarMarketingCard.subtitle: Boundary is an intelligent proxy that creates granular, identity-based access controls for dynamic infrastructure.

sidecarHcpCallout.heading: HCP Boundary
sidecarHcpCallout.description: Securely connect to clouds and remote hosts
